description:
Create Echo (cockatiel) animation for state 'sleeping'.
Spritesheet: horizontal strip; frame size 40x40px; background transparent.
Animation params: frame_count=3, fps=1, loop=infinite.

Echo base pixel template for every frame (40x40 local frame coordinates):
- Transparent background outside silhouette.
- Body fill (#FFA300): all body pixels must be within bounding box x=12..27,y=14..33.
- Head fill (#FFA300): all head pixels must be within bounding box x=14..25,y=8..18.
- Crest (#FFEC27): all crest pixels within x=16..23,y=2..7; crest tip pixel at (19,2) exists unless overridden.
- Eyes open: left 2x2 #1D2B53 at x=17..18,y=12..13; right 2x2 #1D2B53 at x=21..22,y=12..13.
- Eyes closed: for each eye replace 2x2 block with a 2px horizontal line #1D2B53 at y=13 on the same x range.
- Cheek patch (#FF004D): fixed 2x2 at x=24..25,y=14..15 in EVERY frame.
- Beak (#AB5236): 3x2 at x=19..21,y=16..17 unless overridden.
- Feet (#AB5236): y=33, left x=16..17 and right x=22..23.
- Tail (#FFA300): x=19..20,y=30..37.
- Outline: 1px contour #1D2B53 around outer silhouette.
- Shading: optional #5F574F, max 20 pixels per frame, only for y>=24.

Sleeping overrides (3 frames):
- Eyes closed all frames.
- Remove beak pixels (transparent) all frames.
- Do not draw ZZZ in this sprite (separate VFX asset).
acceptance_criteria: For every frame: cheek patch #FF004D exists exactly at x=24..25,y=14..15
For every frame: feet pixels #AB5236 exist at y=33 (x=16..17 and x=22..23)
For every frame: crest pixels are within x=16..23,y=2..7
For open-eye frames: eyes are exactly 2x2 blocks at x=17..18,y=12..13 and x=21..22,y=12..13
For closed-eye frames: eyes are 2px horizontal lines at y=13 on x=17..18 and x=21..22
